tables.name: games
tables.label: Game catalog
tables.description: One row per game this hub offers. Home renders these as cards; the screen column names the screen the card opens, so adding a game = adding a row + a screen.

tables.name: matches
tables.label: Chess matches
tables.description: One row per chess match: the position (FEN), the move log and a status line. The board on the Chess tab plays directly against these rows, so matches persist and sync like any other data.

tables.name: units
tables.label: Skirmish units
tables.description: Pieces on the skirmish map. Drag to move; tap to edit HP after a fight. Recruit buttons add new ones.

tables.name: war
tables.label: Skirmish state
tables.description: The single shared state row for the skirmish: turn counter, gold for both sides, army sizes and the last dice roll.

tables.name: warlog
tables.label: Skirmish rounds
tables.description: A snapshot per ended turn — the round-by-round history of the skirmish.

tables.name: pieces
tables.label: Free-board pieces
tables.description: Pieces on the free board — a blank tabletop for inventing games. Drag to move; tap to rename or recolor (owner).

tables.name: blackjack_cards
tables.label: Cards
tables.description: The deck and every dealt card.

tables.name: blackjack_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: Seats and chip counts.

tables.name: old_maid_cards
tables.label: Cards
tables.description: Every card in play: hands, the pass pile, the discards.

tables.name: old_maid_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: The three seats.

tables.name: go_fish_cards
tables.label: Cards
tables.description: The pond, every hand, and the laid-down books.

tables.name: go_fish_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: The three seats.

tables.name: war_cards
tables.label: Cards
tables.description: The deck, the battlefield, and each player's captured pile.

tables.name: war_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: The two seats.

tables.name: memory_pairs_cards
tables.label: Cards
tables.description: The shuffled layout: face-down spots, flipped cards, and captured pairs.

tables.name: backgammon_checkers
tables.label: Checkers
tables.description: The 30 checkers plus the BAR and BEAR OFF zone markers. Drag to move; tap to edit.

tables.name: backgammon_dice
tables.label: Dice
tables.description: The two dice. Roll buttons on the Board write results here.

tables.name: backgammon_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: Who plays White and Black, with running match score.

tables.name: backgammon_turn
tables.label: Turn
tables.description: Whose turn it is - one shared marker row.

tables.name: checkers_pieces
tables.label: Pieces
tables.description: The 24 checkers on the 8x8 grid. Drag to move; tap to crown a king or remove a captured piece.

tables.name: checkers_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: Who plays Red and Black, with running score.

tables.name: checkers_turn
tables.label: Turn
tables.description: Whose turn it is - one shared marker row.

tables.name: mancala_tokens
tables.label: Tokens
tables.description: 48 seeds, 12 pit labels and 2 stores. Drag seeds between pits to sow; tap to edit.

tables.name: mancala_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: Player A (bottom row) and Player B (top row), with running score.

tables.name: mancala_turn
tables.label: Turn
tables.description: Whose turn it is - one shared marker row.

tables.name: battleship_ships
tables.label: Ships
tables.description: Both fleets; each ship row is visible only to its owner.

tables.name: battleship_shots
tables.label: Shots
tables.description: The public shot log; the defender marks hit or miss.

tables.name: dots_boxes_spots
tables.label: Board spots
tables.description: The dot lattice plus every claimable line marker.

tables.name: dots_boxes_boxes
tables.label: Boxes
tables.description: The nine boxes; set the owner when you close one.

tables.name: tabletop_tokens
tables.label: Tokens
tables.description: Pieces on the shared table. Drag to move; tap to rename or set owner. Everyone sharing this table sees moves (near-live when signed in).

tables.name: saboteur_players
tables.label: Players
tables.description: The lobby: who's at the table. Add yourself, then everyone sharing this applet plays together.

tables.name: saboteur_roles
tables.label: Roles
tables.description: Each player's SECRET role. A role row's visibleTo is set to that player's id, so the engine shows each player ONLY their own role.

tables.name: saboteur_pieces
tables.label: Pieces
tables.description: The shared build on the canvas board. Drag to move; tap to edit. A saboteur can quietly mark a piece sabotaged.

tables.name: saboteur_votes
tables.label: Votes
tables.description: Optional accusation tally: who accused whom.

tables.name: yahtzee_dice
tables.label: Dice
tables.description: The five dice; each roll writes a fresh 1-6.

tables.name: yahtzee_scorecard
tables.label: Scorecard
tables.description: The 13 categories plus upper bonus, one score column per player.

tables.name: runs
tables.label: Runner scores
tables.description: Side-scroller results — score, outcome (clear/down), and run time in seconds.

tables.name: shop
tables.label: Game shop
tables.description: Installable game packs. Tap Install and the game lands on your shelf instantly — tables, screens and a catalog tile, no update needed. Packs can also arrive from the server shelf when online.
